breath.summary: Breath detection looks for the slow alternation of shorter and longer neighboring RR intervals: inhalation usually shortens RR, while exhalation lengthens it.
breath.parameterLink: Min RR delta sets the minimum change between neighboring intervals that counts as a breathing phase shift, while Max RR rejects overly long intervals so pauses and outliers do not distort detection.
breath.rPeakDescription:
R peaks on ECG
R peaks are time markers of heartbeat moments (R1-R3), defined by time or sample index in the raw data.

RR intervals
The distance between neighboring R peaks is measured in milliseconds: this is the RR interval.

BLE data
In a Heart Rate Measurement notification, the rr field contains several accumulated RR intervals between packets (up to 9 by the Bluetooth SIG specification).
breath.minDeltaDescription: Measures the difference between neighboring RR intervals, shown as RR1 and RR2. Smaller changes are ignored.
breath.maxRrDescription: Measures the full width of a single RR interval. Longer intervals are treated as outliers and rejected.
